case_title: LINDA D. THOMAS VS. BEULAH JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAY-13-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, BEULAH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $874.63 FILED BY THOMAS, LINDA D. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, BEULAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, LINDA D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, BEULAH THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT THE PAYMENTS WERE LOANS, OR THAT DEFNDANT AGREED TO PAY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
